testcase.name: App Component Layout > renders LoginSignup if no current user
App Component Layout > renders select server if user is logged in but no active server
App Component Layout > renders ClaimProfile if server is active but no profile claimed
App Component Layout > renders ChatArea and ChannelSidebar if profile is claimed
App Component Layout > maintains layout boundaries when window is resized
appStore > addKnownServer appends unique URLs and persists to localStorage
appStore > updateRelationship merges status updates or removes none status
appStore > setActiveServerId clears activeChannelId and activeChannelName
appStore > addUnreadChannel and removeUnreadChannel modify the unreadChannels Set
ChannelSidebar Component > groups channels under categories correctly
ChannelSidebar Component > handles channel navigation on click
ChannelSidebar Component > shows unread indicator for channels in unreadChannels set
ChatArea component > renders messages correctly with author, and content
testcase.system-err: React does not recognize the `followOutput` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `followoutput` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element. React does not recognize the `initialTopMostItemIndex` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `initialtopmostitemindex` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element.

testcase.name: ChatArea component > renders attachments as images
ChatArea component > triggers pagination when scrolling to top
ChatArea component > updates message list on WebSocket NEW_MESSAGE event
ClaimProfile Component > renders loading state initially
ClaimProfile Component > completes "Fresh Start" flow successfully
ClaimProfile Component > completes "Claim Existing" flow successfully
ClaimProfile Component > displays error message on joining failure (500 status)
File Upload Logic > successfully uploads a file and appends the returned URL to pending attachments
testcase.system-err: React does not recognize the `followOutput` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `followoutput` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element. React does not recognize the `initialTopMostItemIndex` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `initialtopmostitemindex` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element.

testcase.name: File Upload Logic > displays an error alert if the server rejects a file
LoginSignup Component > renders login form by default

Unable to find an element with the text: Password updated successfully! You can now login.. This could be because the text is broken up by multiple elements. testcase.name: LoginSignup Component > updates local state for the custom Network Server URL

testcase.name: Permissions UI Rendering > ChannelSidebar Settings Gear > hides settings gear when user lacks MANAGE_SERVER or ADMINISTRATOR
Permissions UI Rendering > ChannelSidebar Settings Gear > shows settings gear when user has MANAGE_SERVER
Permissions UI Rendering > ChannelSidebar Settings Gear > shows settings gear when user has ADMINISTRATOR
Permissions UI Rendering > ChatArea Message Deletion > hides delete button for others messages if lacking MANAGE_MESSAGES
testcase.system-err: React does not recognize the `followOutput` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `followoutput` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element. React does not recognize the `initialTopMostItemIndex` prop on a DOM element. If you intentionally want it to appear in the DOM as a custom attribute, spell it as lowercase `initialtopmostitemindex` instead. If you accidentally passed it from a parent component, remove it from the DOM element.

testcase.name: Permissions UI Rendering > ChatArea Message Deletion > shows delete button for others messages if has MANAGE_MESSAGES
Permissions UI Rendering > ChatArea Message Deletion > always shows delete button for own messages
Permissions UI Rendering > ServerSettings Access > shows Access Denied if lacking MANAGE_SERVER or ADMINISTRATOR
Permissions UI Rendering > ServerSettings Access > does not show Access Denied if has MANAGE_SERVER
ServerSidebar Component > renders server icons and handles navigation
ServerSidebar Component > opens "Add Peer Server" modal when Plus button is clicked
ServerSidebar Component > opens "Create Chat Server" modal when FolderPlus button is clicked
